arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola urges caution over Kevin De Bruyne and Nathan Ake as Man City wait on injury returns
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne and Nathan Ake both remain on track to return for Manchester City after the international break - but urged caution around both senior players.

arts.ttl: Premier League rejects Manchester City’s plea for longer summer break
arts.sum: Guardiola tells league ‘thank you so much’ for refusal City’s campaign extended by Club World Cup defence Pep Guardiola has revealed the Premier League has rejected Manchester City’s request to delay their start to next season in order to allow players more time to recover from the Club World Cup. City are set to take part in the tournament in the United States next summer, which could see them end their current campaign in mid-July. City have spoken to the Premier League about the prospect of beginning the 2025-2026 season after other top-flight teams and have been told by the authorities that they will not make an exception for the current champions, who will be joined in America by Chelsea. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man City have just struck another off-pitch deal after £300m news confirmed
arts.sum: Man City have evolved into one of the biggest brands in football in recent years, with huge benefits for both their sporting and commercial operations....

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola says he will pay for fans' banner asking him to stay amid continued uncertainty over his future
arts.sum: The 1894 Group raised over £1,000 in less than 24 hours, with the banner set to be displayed at City's game at home to Fulham on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Guardiola raves about four Fulham stars, thinks £22m star is in the form of his life
arts.sum: The Man City boss cannot speak highly enough of Fulham...

arts.ttl: Guardiola says he will pay for banner appealing for him to stay at Man City
arts.sum: Guardiola, who has been at City since 2016, has not indicated if he will sign a new deal but he reiterated his love for the club. Pep Guardiola has offered to pay the cost of a banner from fans appealing for him to stay at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes: Newcastle star 'not interested' in Man City transfer due to 'two factors'
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly suffer a transfer blow in their pursuit of Newcastle United and Brazil midfielder Bruno Guimaraes.

arts.ttl: I’ve been linked to Man United and Man City – this is how I really feel about transfer
arts.sum: Both Manchester clubs have shown an interest in Porto goalkeeper Diogo Costa in recent years, and the star has now explained exactly how he feels on a move to the English top flight

arts.ttl: 'Angry' Pep Guardiola offers Man City future update after £210m 'vote of confidence'
arts.sum: A round-up of the key Man City headlines on Friday, October 4

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Fulham
arts.sum: Rather astonishingly, Man City have won their last 16 encounters with the Cottagers heading into the weekend and will be aiming to extend that record to get back on track after successive Premier League draws. DM: Mateo Kovacic - Having started five of Man City's Premier League matches this season, Kovacic's influence will only become greater in Rodri's absence.
